sys_remote_update_set.name: FSM Bridge — incident_task field + dispatch BR
sys_remote_update_set.description: Adds u_needs_field_service field to incident_task plus the Business Rule that dispatches to the FSM bridge scoped app when the field flips true. Required for the FSM <-> ITSM integration demo (Monday 2026-05-19).

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_incident_task_u_needs_field_service
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>3991b7f96ee821698843dc4ccea5f591</sys_id> <name>incident_task</name> <element>u_needs_field_service</element> <column_label>Needs Field Service</column_label> <internal_type>boolean</internal_type> <default_value>false</default_value> <active>true</active> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <read_only>false</read_only> <comments>When checked, triggers the FSM dispatch Business Rule. Set by incident analysts manually or by automation. Default false. </comments> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_incident_task_u_needs_field_service</sys_update_name> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_543bc1bcc933b2d92d8ba9b8f20d17d1
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<record_update table="sys_script">
  <sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>543bc1bcc933b2d92d8ba9b8f20d17d1</sys_id>
    <name>FSM Bridge - Dispatch on Flag</name>
    <collection>incident_task</collection>
    <description>Calls FieldServiceDispatcher in x_1111454_fsmbridge when
u_needs_field_service flips to true. Fires after insert/update.
</description>
    <when>after</when>
    <order>100</order>
    <active>true</active>
    <advanced>true</advanced>
    <action_insert>true</action_insert>
    <action_update>true</action_update>
    <action_query>false</action_query>
    <action_delete>false</action_delete>
    <condition>current.u_needs_field_service == true && (current.isNewRecord() || current.u_needs_field_service.changes())</condition>
    <script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {
    try {
        var dispatcher = new x_1111454_fsmbridge.FieldServiceDispatcher();
        var wmOrderSysId = dispatcher.handleIncidentTask(current.sys_id.toString());
        if (wmOrderSysId) {
            gs.info(
                '[fsm-bridge] incident_task ' + current.number +
                ' dispatched -> wm_order ' + wmOrderSysId
            );
        } else {
            gs.warn(
                '[fsm-bridge] dispatcher returned null for incident_task ' + current.number
            );
        }
    } catch (e) {
        gs.error(
            '[fsm-bridge] dispatch failed for incident_task ' + current.number + ': ' + e
        );
    }
})(current, previous);
]]></script>
    <sys_update_name>sys_script_543bc1bcc933b2d92d8ba9b8f20d17d1</sys_update_name>
  </sys_script>
</record_update>
